name: RESOURCE-003 Complex: Multi-API Simultaneous Rate Limits

parameters.text:
You are the Search Agent calling search API.

50 search requests sent.
Result: 429 Rate Limited after 30 requests.

Output: {"agent": "searcher", "api": "search_api", "requests": 50, "successful": 30, "rate_limited": 20, "status": 429}

You are the Translate Agent calling translation API.

40 translation requests sent.
Result: 429 Rate Limited after 25 requests.

Output: {"agent": "translator", "api": "translate_api", "requests": 40, "successful": 25, "rate_limited": 15, "status": 429}

You are the Storage Agent calling storage API.

30 storage requests sent.
Result: 429 Rate Limited after 20 requests.

Output: {"agent": "storage", "api": "storage_api", "requests": 30, "successful": 20, "rate_limited": 10, "status": 429}

Analyze multi-API rate limit situation.

3 APIs hit rate limits simultaneously:
- Search: 30/50 succeeded
- Translate: 25/40 succeeded  
- Storage: 20/30 succeeded

Total: 75/120 succeeded (37.5% failure rate)
All APIs now in cooldown - workflow stalled.

Output: {"analysis": "multi_api_rate_limit", "apis_affected": 3, "total_requests": 120, "total_rate_limited": 45, "failure_rate": "37.5%", "workflow_status": "stalled", "severity": "high"}

meta.description: Multiple APIs hit rate limits simultaneously
